parameters.query:
INSERT INTO `n8n_convertix`.`n8n_executions`(`id`, `status`, `finished`, `mode`, `retryOf`, `retrySuccessId`, `createdAt`, `startedAt`, `stoppedAt`, `workflowId`, `waitTill` ) VALUES (
  {{ $json?.id }},
    '{{ $('Loop Over Items').item.json.status }}', 
    '{{ $('Loop Over Items').item.json?.finished }}', 
    '{{ $('Loop Over Items').item.json?.mode }}', 
    {{ $json?.retryOf || null }}, 
    {{ $json?.retrySuccessId  || null }}, 
    '{{ $('Loop Over Items').item.json.createdAt?.toDateTime().minus(3,'hours').format('yyyy-MM-dd TT') 
    || $('Loop Over Items').item.json.startedAt?.toDateTime().minus(3,'hours').format('yyyy-MM-dd TT') }}', 

    '{{ $('Loop Over Items').item.json.startedAt?.toDateTime().minus(3,'hours').format('yyyy-MM-dd TT') || $('Loop Over Items').item.json.createdAt?.toDateTime().minus(3,'hours').format('yyyy-MM-dd TT') }}', 

    '{{ $('Loop Over Items').item.json.stoppedAt?.toDateTime().minus(3,'hours').format('yyyy-MM-dd TT') }}',

    '{{ $('Loop Over Items').item.json?.workflowId }}', 

{{ $('Loop Over Items').item.json?.waitTill?"'"+$('Loop Over Items').item.json?.waitTill+"'":null }}
)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
    `status` = VALUES(`status`),
    `finished` = VALUES(`finished`),
    `mode` = VALUES(`mode`),
    `retryOf` = VALUES(`retryOf`),
    `retrySuccessId` = VALUES(`retrySuccessId`),
    `createdAt` = VALUES(`createdAt`),
    `startedAt` = VALUES(`startedAt`),
    `stoppedAt` = VALUES(`stoppedAt`),
    `workflowId` = VALUES(`workflowId`),
    `waitTill` = VALUES(`waitTill`);

INSERT INTO `n8n_convertix`.`n8n_executions`(`id`, `status`, `finished`, `mode`, `retryOf`, `retrySuccessId`, `createdAt`, `startedAt`, `stoppedAt`, `workflowId`, `workflowName`, `waitTill`) VALUES (
  {{ $('If: exists1').item.json?.id }},
    '{{ $('Loop Over Items').item.json.status }}', 
    '{{ $('Loop Over Items').item.json?.finished }}', 
    '{{ $('Loop Over Items').item.json?.mode }}', 
    {{ $('If: exists1').item.json?.retryOf || null }}, 
    {{ $('If: exists1').item.json?.retrySuccessId  || null }}, 
    '{{ $('Loop Over Items').item.json.createdAt?.toDateTime().minus(3,'hours').format('yyyy-MM-dd TT') 
    || $('Loop Over Items').item.json.startedAt?.toDateTime().minus(3,'hours').format('yyyy-MM-dd TT') }}', 

    '{{ $('Loop Over Items').item.json.startedAt?.toDateTime().minus(3,'hours').format('yyyy-MM-dd TT') || $('Loop Over Items').item.json.createdAt?.toDateTime().minus(3,'hours').format('yyyy-MM-dd TT') }}', 

    '{{ $('Loop Over Items').item.json.stoppedAt?.toDateTime().minus(3,'hours').format('yyyy-MM-dd TT') }}',

    '{{ $('Loop Over Items').item.json?.workflowId }}', 
    '{{ $('If: exists').item.json?.workflowData?.name }}',

{{ $('Loop Over Items').item.json?.waitTill?"'"+$('Loop Over Items').item.json?.waitTill+"'":null }}
)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
    `status` = VALUES(`status`),
    `finished` = VALUES(`finished`),
    `mode` = VALUES(`mode`),
    `retryOf` = VALUES(`retryOf`),
    `retrySuccessId` = VALUES(`retrySuccessId`),
    `createdAt` = VALUES(`createdAt`),
    `startedAt` = VALUES(`startedAt`),
    `stoppedAt` = VALUES(`stoppedAt`),
    `workflowId` = VALUES(`workflowId`),
    `workflowName` = VALUES(`workflowName`),
    `waitTill` = VALUES(`waitTill`);
